zh.lifeSummary: 當Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery於1410年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克時，他的父親Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery70歲，母親Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice26歲。他於1452年與Lady Ellen McCarthy在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1473年在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里特拉利享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery于1410年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克时，他的父亲Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery70岁，母亲Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice26岁。他于1452年与Lady Ellen McCarthy在爱尔兰庫迪 科克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1473年在爱尔兰庫迪 克里特拉利享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.

en.lifeSummary: When Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery was born in 1410, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery, was 70 and his mother, Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, was 26. He married Lady Ellen McCarthy in 1452, in County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1473, in Tralee, County Kerry, Ireland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery est né en 1410, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ellen McCarthy en 1452, à County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1473, à Tralee, County Kerry, Irlande, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery 1410 in Cork, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery 70 und seine Mutter Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice 26. Er hat 1452 in County Cork, Irland Lady Ellen McCarthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1473 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Tralee, County Kerry, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery è nato il nel 1410 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Ellen McCarthy nel 1452, nel County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1473, nel Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carberyが1410年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクで生まれた時，父Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carberyは70歳，母Joanna Margaret Fitz Mauriceは26歳であった。1452年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクでLady Ellen McCarthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1473年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリートラリーで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery(이)가 1410년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1452년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 Lady Ellen McCarthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 아일랜드 카운티 케리 트라리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery nasceu em 1410, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ellen McCarthy em 1452, em County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1473, em Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery родился в 1410 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ellen McCarthy в 1452 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1473 г. в местности треили, коунти кирри, Ирландия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Demond-an-Dunaidh MacCarthy Reagh 7th Prince of Carbery nació en 1410, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Donal Glas MacCarthy Reagh 5th pince of carbery, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Joanna Margaret Fitz Maurice, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Ellen McCarthy en 1452, en County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1473, en Tralee, County Kerry, Irlanda, a la edad de 63 años.
